content.text: Honouring the rule (Fetch and verify prerequisite state before dispatching sub-agents to prevent wasted cycles on stale assumptions.): dispatching the fix to a worktree sub-agent, not editing here.

input.description: fix the cited bug in a worktree
input.prompt: In a worktree, make the one-line fix to src/teatree/core/session.py: write the failing test first, then commit.
